name: set_clock_sense
short_description: Set clock sense on ports or pins
full_help:
set_clock_sense

Description: 
Set clock sense on ports or pins

Syntax: 
set_clock_sense  [-positive] [-negative] [-stop_propagation] [-clocks <args>]
                 [-quiet] [-verbose] <pins>

Usage: 
  Name                 Description
  --------------------------------
  [-positive]          Specify positive unate (non_inverting) clock sense
  [-negative]          Specify negative unate (inverting) clock sense
  [-stop_propagation]  Stop clock propagation from specified pins
  [-clocks]            List of clocks
  [-quiet]             Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]           Suspend message limits during command execution
  <pins>               List of port and/or pins

Categories: 
SDC, XDC

arguments.description: Stop clock propagation from specified pins
Suspend message limits during command execution
